reasoning: Tank is cycling predictably: zero ammonia/nitrite, nitrate at 80ppm confirms active nitrification. All parameters green—temp stable, pH drifting slightly alkaline (normal as minerals accumulate), TDS in comfort zone. This is a healthy Day 20 snapshot.

Monitor TDS weekly; when it hits 250ppm, perform partial water change.
If shrimp present, watch for feeding/behavior changes as indicator of bioload stability.
suggested_actuator_actions: None required. Tank stable—no heater/chiller/air adjustment needed.
